title: Was emo Shinji becoming AN HERO in 25
display_title: Was emo Shinji becoming AN HERO in 25
wikitext:
[]: Was emo Shinji becoming AN HERO in 25'?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 03, 2009 12:54 am Offshoot of this old thread. Anno mentioned Shinji's inability to commit suicide. Ep4: He's sitting on a cliff famous for such according to the script. Ep25': His head's wet; he's at the lake he talked with Misato at the night before. Ep26': Instrumenality=allegory for suicide, nuff said. What was he doing at the start of EoE? I don't think it's a stretch he tried to die like that, given everything up to that point.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:08 am IIRC, wasn't the general consensus that he tried drowning himself?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:25 am I believe it was, though something script-wise instead of just evidence with his "I want to die" lines (words to Misato), resisting the JSSDF, and mourning Kaworu would be nice. Basically, would Shinji have it in him to commit a half-assed drowning attempt? I think so, but... Rebuild 1.0  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:27 am Wow, so Shinji tried to kill himself in episode 4. Now gf/I thought about that and she said "I thought so then it turned out to be a beautiful scene." So when he was standing beside the water, he tried to drown himself? Please do explain more.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:59 am Shinji just sat by the cliff in Ep4. With EoE, Misato left Shinji alone all night or he returned to the lake the next morning then did the deed with dunking his head. This is all before he sees Asuka by the way. Now, is there anything to suggest the shots of Misato's gun and her looking exhausted/upset in 23' or 24' (I forget which episode, but it's after Misato says she accepted Kaji's feelings for her) implies Misato entertained the thought of suicide (before she came to terms Kaji's death)?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 03, 2009 3:08 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Wow, so Shinji tried to kill himself in episode 4. Now gf/I thought about that and she said "I thought so then it turned out to be a beautiful scene."

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Dec 03, 2009 11:22 am Indeed, he might have felt disappointed when Misato showed up to save him.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Thu Dec 03, 2009 12:00 pm Wow i didn't think there was anything i didnt know about nge, but here we are. This is news to me :/ Never knew about ep4 and suicide and tbh never really wondered about the wet hair.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:00 pm So he thought about drowning himself but did not, understandable.

[]:             Quote Post by DAVEvangelion » Thu Dec 03, 2009 2:12 pm I find Shinji's inability to commit suicide much more interesting than the fact that he attempted it. Why can't he do it? Is it due more to a physical or a mental/psychological inability?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Dec 03, 2009 2:34 pm I find Shinji's inability to commit suicide much more interesting than the fact that he attempted it. Why can't he do it? Is it due more to a physical or a mental/psychological inability?

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Thu Dec 03, 2009 2:49 pm DAVEvangelion wrote: I find Shinji's inability to commit suicide much more interesting than the fact that he attempted it. Why can't he do it? Is it due more to a physical or a mental/psychological inability?

[]:             Quote Post by DAVEvangelion » Thu Dec 03, 2009 2:59 pm Rodeo wrote: Don't most attempters find themselves unable to do it?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Dec 03, 2009 3:19 pm I like to think that Shinji is so helpless and incompetent that he tripped into the water on accident, tried to take suicidal advantage, and failed.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Thu Dec 03, 2009 7:37 pm You're all reading way too much into a shot of Shinji with his bangs covering his eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu Dec 03, 2009 10:15 pm DAVEvangelion wrote: I find Shinji's inability to commit suicide much more interesting than the fact that he attempted it. Why can't he do it? Is it due more to a physical or a mental/psychological inability?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 03, 2009 11:02 pm Tines: Thanks for the image link. Luc: Then why is his head all wet? I seriously doubt it's just from the heat that day. DAVEvangelion wrote: So is Shinji, as Anno has stated, truly unable to commit the act or is his "attempt" more of a cry for help?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Dec 03, 2009 11:05 pm Possibly. Also didnt he walk up to cliffface or something like that in Episode 4 before he ran into Kensuke?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Dec 03, 2009 11:29 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: Possibly. Also didnt he walk up to cliffface or something like that in Episode 4 before he ran into Kensuke?

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Fri Dec 04, 2009 6:17 am Wait, so... Shinji - Tried to drown himself Asuka - Cut her wrists Rei - Blew herself up Kaworu - Let himself be smushed by Unit 01 Touji - ? Really Touji's the non-suicidal one?
summary: []: Was emo Shinji becoming AN HERO in 25'?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 03, 2009 12:54 am Offshoot of this old thread.
